raw.message:
누구나 쉽고 재미있게 한게임 포커
지금 플레이하고 칩 쓸어 담아가세요

hook.summary: Fast-paced poker gameplay montage with beginner-friendly messaging.
hook.visual_action: Rapidly changing poker hands and accumulating chip stacks with bold text overlays.

scene_flow: Rapid montage of poker hands and accumulating chip stacks with high-energy sound effects.
Dynamic transition featuring a glowing spade icon and green light rays.
Bold 'RIGHT NOW' text animation on a checkered background.
Final brand reveal with 'HANGAME POKER' logo and a call to action for a 1 billion chip reward.
audience_proxy: Korean adults looking for an accessible yet high-stakes mobile poker experience.
